account_memo.business_hours: Monday - Friday, 8 AM - 5 PM (flexible for early appointments if arranged, 6 AM was requested but standard starts 8 AM)
services_supported: Hot tub electrical hookups (running dedicated circuits, GFCI protection, wiring to code)
Generator connections (requires assessment for sizing and transfer switch)
account_memo.emergency_definition: Critical situations for existing property managers/general contractors (e.g., gas station pump failure), or immediate safety hazards for any caller.
account_memo.emergency_routing_rules: For defined emergencies (critical for regular clients or immediate safety hazards), calls should be automatically routed for immediate transfer to Ben (or on-call technician).
account_memo.non_emergency_routing_rules: All other calls should be screened by Clara, details collected, and logged to the dashboard. Notifications (email/text) sent to Ben for review and assignment to team members.

call_transfer_rules.personal_contacts: Calls from whitelisted personal numbers (e.g., Ben's wife) bypass screening and transfer directly to Ben.
call_transfer_rules.vip_customers: Calls from whitelisted VIP customers (strong relationship clients) bypass screening and transfer directly to Ben.
call_transfer_rules.ask_for_ben: If a caller asks for Ben (and is not VIP/personal), Clara will politely ask for the purpose of the call before attempting a transfer.
call_transfer_rules.accounting_inquiries: If an accounting department were established, invoice-related inquiries would be routed to them (currently handled by Ben/Clara logs).
call_transfer_rules.emergency_routing: Defined emergency calls attempt immediate transfer to Ben/on-call.

account_memo.integration_constraints: Jobber integration is in process and coming soon. Current integrations exist with Service Titan, Housecall Pro, Service Fusion, Zen. QuickBooks is used for accounting (invoicing through Jobber).
account_memo.after_hours_flow_summary: Clara operates 24/7. During after-hours, it will confirm if the call is an emergency. If so, it attempts to route to the on-call person. If not an emergency, it collects detailed information and schedules the service for the first available slot during the next business day (after 8 AM), notifying Ben/team via dashboard, email, and text.
account_memo.office_hours_flow_summary: Clara acts as the primary receptionist, answering calls, understanding the caller's purpose, collecting essential service request details (name, address, number, issue, preferred time/date), qualifying jobs, and filtering out sales/spam calls. It can also upsell club memberships. All call details are logged to a dashboard with email/text notifications for Ben to review and assign.
notes: Ben has 30 years experience as an electrician, 8 years running his own business.
Company is currently a sole proprietor, but plans to incorporate this year.
Team consists of Ben, three journeymen, one apprentice (seeking another), and two subcontractors. Goal is 5 company vans by year-end.
Ben is bringing on an Operations Manager/Estimator (Greg) to assist with admin and estimating.
Ben currently handles all admin, back-end, and quotes, also goes to field for quotes.
Team members in the field frequently contact Ben for troubleshooting support.
Previously had a live virtual assistant (~year 2-3 of business) but found it wasn't a good fit and he didn't utilize it effectively.
No prior experience with AI solutions.
Current call volume estimate: 20-50 calls/week (includes small customers, regular contractors, inspectors, field guys, and sales calls).
Interested in Clara Answers for call screening, information capture, and filtering sales calls.
Initial plan selected: Starter plan at $249/month for 500 minutes, on a 3-month contract (approx. $750 + tax CAD upfront). Price locked for 12 months if renewed.
Kickoff call scheduled for tomorrow noon (Friday).
Ben's personal cell number is currently also the business number; he plans to separate them. Clara will be configured via call forwarding.
Clara will suggest appointment times but will not confirm final bookings as field job durations are unpredictable. Ben/team will confirm in Jobber.
Clara also mentioned other agents (dispatcher, reminders, reviews, collections, field copilot), but initial focus is on the receptionist agent (Clara Answers).
questions_or_unknowns: Exact closing time for standard business hours.
Full details and benefits of the 'club membership' upsell offering.
Confirmation on whether Ben has any dedicated 'accounting department' or if he handles all invoice disputes personally (mentioned for routing capabilities, but not confirmed for Ben's setup).
Specific types of plumbing/gas line connections Ben's Electric Solutions *does* perform for hot tubs (beyond just electrical, which they do).
Full legal company name for 'Ben's Electric Solutions' upon incorporation.
